title: ResourceDirectoryResource unbounded entries allows DoS
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:785

The Resource Directory accepts unlimited registration entries:
```python
self._entries[reg_id] = entry
```

An attacker can exhaust node memory by repeatedly POSTing registrations with different endpoint names. Each registration also mounts a resource at /rd/<id>, further consuming memory.

Fix: Add a maximum entry limit and reject new registrations when full. Consider adding per-endpoint rate limiting or requiring authentication for RD access.
